headlines.title: Photos from the 152nd Kentucky Derby: The best day in horse racing, the 'sport of kings'
headlines.description: Once again, tens of thousands flocked to Churchill Downs, dressed to the nines, to partake in one of the grandest spectacles in sport and, perhaps, travel back in time.

headlines.title: 2026 Kentucky Derby guide: Time, TV channels, betting favorites and more
headlines.description: Get the latest ahed of the 2026 Kentucky Derby, including how to watch, what time it starts, where to watch or stream the race, who is expected to win and more.

headlines.title: Supreme Court asked to pause ruling blocking telehealth and mail access to abortion pills
headlines.description: Danco Laboratories, one of makers of the mifepristone abortion pill on Saturday asked the Supreme Court to pause a lower court ruling that imposed a nationwide requirement for the medication to be dispensed in-person.

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines announces all flights are canceled as it shuts down operations
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines announced in a statement that it would wind down operations immediately, canceling all flights, over rising jet fuel costs and struggling with profitability. NBC News’ Jay Blackman reports on how the decision will impact thousands of employees and travelers.

headlines.title: Trump administration to pull 5,000 troops from Germany
headlines.description: The Pentagon will withdraw roughly 5,000 U.S. troops from Germany, a move that comes amid President Trump’s growing clash with European allies over Iran and NATO tensions. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Boy, 14, shot dead by Israeli settlers in West Bank amid escalation in violence
headlines.description: AL-MUGHAYYIR, OCCUPIED WEST BANK – A boy’s blood still stained the sidewalk in front of his school, days after an Israeli settler shot him dead

headlines.description: Pickup truck drives off a cliff in South Africa

headlines.title: Man says Waymo drove away with his luggage

headlines.title: Trump admin says Iran war not to blame for Spirit shutdown
headlines.description: Transportation Sec. Sean Duffy tells reporters that the collapse of Spirit Arlines was years in the making, blaming the Biden administration’s denial of a merger with JetBlue in 2024, and not the recent Iran war, which has sent jet fuel costs soaring.

headlines.title: Duffy explains why there was no bailout of Spirit
headlines.description: Duffy explains why there was no bailout of Spirit
